title: SerializedNode
description: Plain-old-JSON description of a single scene-graph node. Always carries a `type` tag (the registered type name) plus an open set of common transform/visual fields and type-specific fields. Every field is JSON-serialisable; runtime-only state (caches, dirty flags, matrices, signals, GPU resources) is never present. Common fields are written by the framework and omitted when they hold their default value, so a freshly-constructed node serialises to `{ type }` alone.

sections.title: Import
paragraphs: Plain-old-JSON description of a single scene-graph node.

Always carries a `type` tag (the registered type name) plus an open set of common transform/visual fields and type-specific fields. Every field is JSON-serialisable; runtime-only state (caches, dirty flags, matrices, signals, GPU resources) is never present.
Common fields are written by the framework and omitted when they hold their default value, so a freshly-constructed node serialises to `{ type }` alone.

members.name: name
members.description: Optional node identity (SceneNode.name); omitted when null.
